news_items.headline: The Rockies can no longer treat shortstop as settled
news_items.summary: Ezequiel Tovar ranks last in fWAR and wRC+ among regular shortstops, and the elite defense that once supported his profile has fallen back to average.

news_items.headline: Paul Blackburn is giving the Yankees exactly what they need
news_items.summary: The Bombers need still impact arms, but the right-hander is enjoying a career-best season as a multi-inning reliever.

news_items.headline: Thursday Jays Notes
news_items.summary: Out last off-day of the All-Star break. There is an MLB game today, the Mets and Phillies are playing tonight. The Jays play tomorrow night, it is an Apple TV game, only of those things I hate. The Jays have Spencer Miles starting tomorrow. I don’t understand why we have a bullpen type day after […]

news_items.headline: Jordan Walker won the Home Run Derby. He wants to lead the next wave of Black athletes into baseball
news_items.summary: The significance of representation in the Black community never was lost on Jordan Walker.

news_items.headline: All-Star starter rising fast in latest SP Power Rankings

news_items.summary: The Giants can hit, but they can’t do much else. At least, that’s what the first part of the season told us.
